cover: System architecture diagram: 'Salesforce MCP + Agentforce 2.0 Without Custom Code'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Connect AI Agents to Salesforce with @salesforce/mcp'. Subtitle 'Model Context Protocol tools, org metadata, CLI skills, Agentforce sessions, and secure user-mode access'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'AI Clients' pastel blue: modules 'Claude Sonnet 4.7 Desktop', 'GPT-5.5 Agent Runner', 'Agentforce 2.0'. LAYER 2 '@salesforce/mcp Server' pastel violet: modules 'SOQL Tools', 'Metadata Tools', 'sf CLI Skills'. LAYER 3 'Salesforce Org API v64.0' pastel green: modules 'Objects', 'Flows', 'Agent Scripts', 'Data 360'. Central node 'MCP Tool Router' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER upper right: 'MuleSoft API-to-MCP' and 'Heroku MCP Hosting'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Enterprise Guardrails': sub-modules 'OAuth', 'Permission Sets', 'Audit Logs' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce MCP Release Triage Pattern'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Release Triage with @salesforce/mcp'. Subtitle 'Use real org metadata instead of screenshots and Slack archaeology'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Metadata Context with FlowDefinition icon', 'SOQL Diagnostics with database icon', 'CLI Skills with terminal icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD TRIAGE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'MCP TRIAGE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: const guess = \"Flow failed because permissions maybe changed\"; await postToSlack(guess); right column green border '// GOOD' code: const flow = await mcp.callTool(\"salesforce.query\", { q: \"SELECT Id, DeveloperName, ActiveVersion.VersionNumber FROM FlowDefinition WHERE DeveloperName = 'Case_Intake'\" }); BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'read-only connected user', 'approval for deploys', 'audit tool calls'. Footer bar: 'Agents need tools, permissions, and logs — not vibes.'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Secure Tool Access for Salesforce MCP Agents'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'MCP Guardrails for Salesforce Agents'. Subtitle 'Permissions beat prompt instructions every time'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Read-Only First with shield icon', 'Human Approval with checkmark icon', 'Audit Every Tool Call with log icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'PROMPT-ONLY SECURITY' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'POLICY-GATED TOOLS' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: systemPrompt += \"Never delete records in production\"; await tool.call(\"delete_records\", input); right column green border '// GOOD' code: if (env === \"production\" && action === \"delete_records\" && !approved) throw new Error(\"Approval required\"); BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'least privilege user', 'tool allowlist', 'production approval gate'. Footer bar: 'Do not outsource access control to a paragraph.'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
